message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to event handlers and test functions

Formats mouse event handlers with proper line breaking and simplifies
test helper functions using struct initialization syntax.

Changes:
• Wrap on_mouse_down/on_mouse_up handlers for readability
• Use struct initialization shorthand in sample_agent()
• Remove unnecessary mut from batch_one variable

No functional changes - formatting only.
